visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: findIndex Method
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the custom for-loop search to use the built-in `Array.prototype.findIndex()` method.

solution.code: const search = (arr, target) => arr.findIndex(item => item === target);
solution.explanation: JavaScript arrays provide powerful built-in methods like `findIndex()` that are more declarative and less prone to off-by-one errors than manual for-loops.
